translation.text: “The Prophet (Allah bless him and give him peace) entered Mecca on the Day of Victory wearing a black turban.”
"I saw a black turban on the head of Allah’s Messenger (Allah bless him and give him peace).”
translation.narrator: 'Amr ibn Huraith reported that his father said:

translation.text: "The Prophet (Allah bless him and give him peace) addressed the people while wearing a black turban.”
translation.narrator: 'Amr ibn Huraith reported that his father said:

translation.text: "When the Prophet (Allah bless him and give him peace) donned a turban, he let his turban hang down between his shoulders.”
“The Prophet (Allah bless him and give him peace) addressed the people while wearing a turban that was dasma’ .
